title: German Hash Brown Potato Casserole
description: A hearty German-inspired casserole featuring crispy hash browns, potatoes, and a nutty twist. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the shredded potatoes and grated hash browns.
In a separate pan, sauté the diced onion and minced garlic until softened.
Add the cooked onion and garlic mixture to the bowl with the potatoes and hash browns.
Stir in the shredded Springy croatian cheese and crumbled nutty wheat bread.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the mixture to a greased 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake for 30-40 minutes or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
